phrases.english: You're a true friend, always there.
Thanks for everything, my dear friend.
Such a wonderful day, isn't it?
You are my sunshine, my only joy.
My heart beats, only for you.
I dream of you, every night.
Rome wasn't built, in a day.
Do you have this, in blue?
Where can I find, the fitting rooms?
phrases.hebrew: איפה אפשר למצוא, את תאי המדידה?
phrases.transliteration: Eifo efshar limtzo, et te'ei hamadida?

phrases.english: Can I try this on?, please?
Try again, you can do it.
My son, he loves to play.
You are so kind, thank you.
Enjoy the journey, not just the destination.
Hello, it's nice to meet you.
Good evening, I'm happy to see you.
Don't give up now, keep going.
Push through, it will be worth it.
I forgive you, from my heart.
I let go, of the past.
I'll take this one, thank you.
Do you accept cards?, or cash?
Can I get a bag?, please?
This makes me smile, a lot.
You color my world, in vibrant hues.
phrases.hebrew: את/ה צובע/ת את עולמי, בגוונים עזים.
phrases.transliteration: At/ah tzove'ah et olami, be'gvanim azim.

phrases.english: My favorite place, is by your side.
In your eyes, I see home.
You're the missing piece, I searched for.
My quiet moments, are filled with you.
Nourish the mind, feed the soul.
phrases.hebrew: הזן את המוח, האכל את הנשמה.
phrases.transliteration: Haz'en et hamoch, ha'achel et haneshama.

phrases.english: Navigate new paths, embrace the journey.
phrases.hebrew: נווט בדרכים חדשות, חבק את המסע.
phrases.transliteration: Navet b'drachim chadashot, chab'k et hamasa.

phrases.english: Weave your tapestry, with vibrant threads.
phrases.hebrew: שזור את האריג שלך, בחוטים צבעוניים.
phrases.transliteration: Shzor et ha'arig shel'cha, b'chutim tziv'oniyim.

phrases.english: Unlock new worlds, one word at a time.
phrases.hebrew: פתח עולמות חדשים, מילה אחר מילה.
phrases.transliteration: P'tach olamot chadashim, milah achar milah.

phrases.english: Dive in deep, the language awaits.
Taste the culture, through its words.
The sky, a deep blue today.
Her dress, a soft green hue.
A splash of yellow, bright and bold.
His shirt, a warm orange glow.
New sounds, new worlds, open wide.
phrases.hebrew: צלילים חדשים, עולמות חדשים, נפתחים לרווחה.
phrases.transliteration: Tslilim chadashim, olamot chadashim, niftaḥim la'ravaḥ.

phrases.hebrew: הקול שלך, מוצא את השיר שלו.
phrases.transliteration: Ha'kol shelkha, motze et ha'shir shelo.

phrases.english: Unlock new stories, word by word.
phrases.hebrew: פתח סיפורים חדשים, מילה אחר מילה.
phrases.transliteration: Ptaḥ sipurim ḥadashim, milah aḥar milah.

phrases.english: Happy New Year, full of joy.
Sukkot is here, build your booth.
My grandma, she tells the best stories.
phrases.hebrew: סבתא שלי, היא מספרת את הסיפורים הכי טובים.
phrases.transliteration: Savta sheli, hi mesaperet et hasipurim hachi tovim.

phrases.english: My grandpa, he built this whole house.
phrases.hebrew: סבא שלי, הוא בנה את כל הבית הזה.
phrases.transliteration: Saba sheli, hu banah et kol habayit hazeh.

phrases.english: My aunt, she makes amazing challah.
phrases.hebrew: דודה שלי, היא אופה חלה מדהימה.
phrases.transliteration: Doda sheli, hi ofa challah madhima.

phrases.english: My uncle, he knows all the jokes.
phrases.hebrew: דוד שלי, הוא מכיר את כל הבדיחות.
phrases.transliteration: Dod sheli, hu makir et kol habdichot.

phrases.english: My cousin, she loves to paint.
phrases.hebrew: בת דודה שלי, היא אוהבת לצייר.
phrases.transliteration: Bat dodah sheli, hi ohevet letzayer.

phrases.english: Feeling a little bit tired, now.
A surge of pure joy, inside.
Stretch your body, open your mind.
phrases.hebrew: מתח את הגוף, פתח את התודעה.
phrases.transliteration: Metach et haguf, petach et hatoda'ah.

phrases.english: Sip your coffee, plan your day.
Listen to the birds, feel alive.
Sketch your vision, then sculpt it.
Listen to silence, find your spark.
phrases.hebrew: הקשב לדממה, מצא את הניצוץ שלך.
phrases.transliteration: Hakshav la'd'mama, metza et ha'nitzotz shelcha.

phrases.english: What if you tried, something new?
Connect the dots, in your mind.
A light heart, makes the day bright.
Learn a word, say it loud.
Read a sentence, feel the flow.
Ask a question, seek the answer.

phrases.hebrew: שירו את השיר שלכם, הלב פתוח.
phrases.transliteration: Shiro et hashir shelachem, halev patuach.

phrases.english: Compose your joy, note by note.
phrases.hebrew: חברו את השמחה שלכם, תו אחר תו.
phrases.transliteration: Chabru et hasimcha shelachem, tov achar tov.

phrases.english: Sow seeds of hope, watch them bloom.
phrases.hebrew: זרע זרעי תקווה, ראה אותם פורחים.
phrases.transliteration: Zera zi'ei tikva, re'eh otam p'orchim.

phrases.english: Embrace the journey, not just the destination.
phrases.hebrew: חבק את המסע, לא רק את היעד.
phrases.transliteration: Chab'ek et ha'masa, lo rak et ha'ya'ad.

phrases.english: My favorite jacket, where is it?
Your help, made all the difference.
What a lovely surprise, thank you.
I feel so lucky, knowing you.
phrases.hebrew: אני מרגיש כל כך בר מזל, להכיר אותך.
phrases.transliteration: Ani margish kol kach mazal, lehakir otach.

phrases.english: This means so much, to me.
phrases.hebrew: זה אומר כל כך הרבה, לי.
phrases.transliteration: Ze omer kol kach harbeh, li.

phrases.english: I'm looking, for a good spot.
Your Hebrew is blossoming, watch it grow.
phrases.hebrew: העברית שלך פורחת, צפה בה גדלה.
phrases.transliteration: Ha'ivrit shelcha poreachat, tzafeh bah g'dela.

phrases.english: This journey, your courage shines through.
You're building fluency, brick by brick.
phrases.hebrew: אתה בונה שטף, לבנה אחר לבנה.
phrases.transliteration: Atah boneh shetef, liv'na ach'rei liv'na.

phrases.english: Unlock new worlds, with every word.
Find your calm, in the storm.
You make me laugh, a lot.
May our path clear, forward now.
We release the old, embrace the new.
phrases.hebrew: משחררים את הישן, מקבלים את החדש.
phrases.transliteration: Meshachrerim et hayashan, mekablilim et hachadash.

phrases.english: This is exactly, what I needed.
Could you show me, something similar?
Do you have, a matching set?
Hear the ancient echoes, feel the present pulse.
phrases.hebrew: שמע את ההדים העתיקים, הרגש את הפעימה הנוכחית.
phrases.transliteration: Shma et ha-hedim ha-atikiim, regesh et ha-pe'ima ha-nochachit.

phrases.english: Taste the new language, savor each sound.
phrases.hebrew: טעם את השפה החדשה, התענג על כל צליל.
phrases.transliteration: Ta'am et ha-safah ha-chadashah, hit'aneg al kol tzlil.

phrases.english: Unravel the wisdom, stitch your own understanding.
phrases.hebrew: פרק את החוכמה, תפור את ההבנה שלך.
phrases.transliteration: Parek et ha-chochmah, taf'or et ha-havanah shelcha.

phrases.english: Open your mind, expand your world.
phrases.hebrew: פתח את דעתך, הרחב את עולמך.
phrases.transliteration: Ptach et da'atcha, harchav et olamcha.

phrases.english: Follow the rhythm, find your flow.
phrases.hebrew: עקוב אחר הקצב, מצא את הזרימה שלך.
phrases.transliteration: Akav achar ha-ketzev, metza et ha-zrimah shelcha.

phrases.hebrew: את/ה מאיר/ה לי את היום, תמיד.
phrases.transliteration: at/a me'ir/a li et ha'yom, tamid.

phrases.english: Flow like water, find your center.
phrases.hebrew: שטוף כמו מים, מצא את מרכזך.
phrases.transliteration: Shtof kmo mayim, metza et merkazcha.

phrases.english: Listen to the quiet, it speaks truth.
Gentle spirit, open heart, pure light.
phrases.hebrew: רוח עדינה, לב פתוח, אור טהור.
phrases.transliteration: Ruach adina, lev patuach, or tahor.

phrases.english: Embrace the stillness, feel the peace.
phrases.hebrew: חבק את הדממה, הרג את השלווה.
phrases.transliteration: Chabek et ha'demama, harg et ha'shleva.

phrases.english: Listen, and the words will bloom.
A new sound, a new feeling.
Budget your dreams, fund your future.
phrases.hebrew: תקציב את חלומותיך, ממן את עתידך.
phrases.transliteration: Tak'tzeiv et chalomotecha, mam'ne et atidecha.

phrases.english: Diversify your assets, calm your mind.
phrases.hebrew: גּוּון את נכסיך, הרגע את נפשך.
phrases.transliteration: Gaven et ne'chasim, harega et naf'shecha.

phrases.english: A time for family, gathering near.
Sharing sweet treats, a special day.
Songs fill the air, hearts rejoice.

phrases.hebrew: את/ה מרגיש/ה, כמו בית סוף סוף.
phrases.transliteration: At/Ata margish/margish-ah, kmo bayit sof sof.

phrases.english: Listen to your body, it knows.

phrases.hebrew: מצא את האיזון שלך, שלווה פנימית.
phrases.transliteration: M'tze et ha'izun shelcha, sh'lva pnimít.

phrases.english: Taste the moment, savor the future.
phrases.hebrew: טעם את הרגע, התענג על העתיד.
phrases.transliteration: Ta'am et ha'rega, hit'aneg al ha'atid.

phrases.english: My sister, bright as the sun.
Plant a seed, watch it sprout.
A calm sea, builds strong ships.
A quiet calm, washing over me.

phrases.hebrew: אור הבוקר, פוגש את החלון שלי.
phrases.transliteration: Or ha-boker, pogeish et ha-chalon sheli.

phrases.english: Imagine the sentence, in your head.
Observe the sky, in its vastness.
Feel the rhythm, of your pulse.
phrases.hebrew: הרגש את הקצב, של הדופק שלך.
phrases.transliteration: Regesh et haketzev, shel hadofek shelcha.

phrases.english: A gentle word, a warm heart.
A moment of peace, for everyone.
Taste the ancient, feel the modern.
phrases.hebrew: לטעם את העתיק, להרגיש את המודרני.
phrases.transliteration: Lita'am et ha'atik, le'hargish et hamoderni.

phrases.english: Sing with the rhythm, of this land.
phrases.hebrew: שירו עם הקצב, של הארץ הזו.
phrases.transliteration: Shiru im hakatzev, shel ha'aretz hazu.

phrases.english: Breathe in Hebrew, speak out loud.
Let the letters, dance on your tongue.
Your accent, is your unique sound.
A gentle breeze, lifts the spirit.
Let go, of what weighs you.
Listen to the rhythm, Hebrew flows.
His eyes, the deep sea's grey.
We walk this path, side by side.
phrases.hebrew: אנו הולכים בדרך, כתף אל כתף.
phrases.transliteration: Anu holchim ba'derech, katef el katef.

phrases.english: A bond, that time can't break.
Embrace the climb, for the view.
My day begins, with your thought.
Open your heart, to new adventures.
Trust your path, it unfolds beautifully.
phrases.hebrew: סמוך על דרכך, היא נפרשת יפה.
phrases.transliteration: S'moch al darkcha, hi nifr'eset yafeh.

phrases.english: Greet the sun, with a smile.
Plant a good thought, nurture its growth.
phrases.hebrew: שתול מחשבה טובה, טפח את צמיחתה.
phrases.transliteration: Shtol machsheva tova, tef'ach et ts'michatah.

phrases.english: Let laughter echo, fill your day.
phrases.hebrew: תן לצחוק להדהד, למלא את יומך.
phrases.transliteration: Ten latzchok le'hada'id, le'maleh et yomech.

phrases.english: Sunshine on your face, a smile will bloom.
A walk in nature, find your calm.
Warm tea, a moment of comfort.
Stretch your arms, reach for the sky.

phrases.hebrew: עשית לי את היום, יותר טוב.
phrases.transliteration: Asita li et hayom, yoter tov.

phrases.english: I feel so alive, right now.
phrases.hebrew: אני מרגיש/ה כל כך חי/ה, עכשיו.
phrases.transliteration: Ani margish/a kol kach chai/cha, achshav.

phrases.english: Hear the rhythm, feel the pulse.
phrases.hebrew: שמע את הקצב, הרגש את הדופק.
phrases.transliteration: Shma et ha'ketzev, regesh et ha'dofek.

phrases.english: Play your tune, let it ring.
phrases.hebrew: נגן את המנגינה שלך, תן לה להדהד.
phrases.transliteration: Nagen et ha'melodia shelcha, ten lah le'hached.

phrases.english: A friendly face, a warm smile.

phrases.hebrew: הַשְּׁקִיעָה שֶׁל הַיּוֹם, הַתַּגְמוּל שֶׁל מָחָר.
phrases.transliteration: hashqi'ah shel hayom, hatagmul shel maḥar.

phrases.english: Your mind, a garden, grow it.
Unlock the ancient tongue, with joy.
Let your voice, bloom in Hebrew.
Listen to your heart, it knows.

phrases.hebrew: הוקר את השקט, חבק את הצליל.
phrases.transliteration: Hoker et hasheket, chabuk et hatzlil.

phrases.english: A stylish hat, for the sun.

phrases.hebrew: המכנסיים הקצרים האלה, האם הם כותנה?
phrases.transliteration: Ha-miknasayim ha-qtsarim ha'ele, ha'im hem kutna?

phrases.english: His lips, curved in a smile.
Sunlight on my face, worries fade.
Listen to the wind, it whispers secrets.
phrases.transliteration: Shma la ruach, hee locheshet sodot.

phrases.english: Sunrise paints the sky, a new day dawns.
The river flows, carrying dreams downstream.
Beneath the moon, stars begin to gleam.
Forest floor, soft with fallen leaves.
Open a book, unlock a world.
Connect the dots, see the picture.
phrases.hebrew: חבר את הנקודות, ראה את התמונה.
phrases.transliteration: Chaber et ha'nekudot, re'eh et ha'tmunah.

phrases.english: Listen to the story, feel the meaning.
Stars twinkle high, night is calm.
Sweet dates offered, taste the joy.
A mindful moment, to just be.
A warm embrace, for the heart.
Don't force the bloom, just tend.
phrases.hebrew: אל תכריח את הפריחה, רק תטפל.
phrases.transliteration: Al tichrich et ha'pricha, rak titapel.

phrases.english: Give space, for growth to happen.
Your presence, a gift. Remember that.
The weight lifts, from my soul.
My heart opens, a little wider.
Just a little while, then we go.
When the sun sets, we'll gather.
Before the clock strikes, be ready.
After the rain, a rainbow appears.
You light up, my darkest corners.
phrases.hebrew: את/ה מאיר/ה, את הפינות האפלות שלי.
phrases.transliteration: Ata/At me'ir/a, et ha'pinot ha'afeluot sheli.

phrases.english: My world found, its center in you.
Sip the story, taste the spirit.
phrases.hebrew: לגום את הסיפור, לטעום את הרוח.
phrases.transliteration: Ligum et hasipur, leta'am et haruach.

phrases.english: Echoes of ages, in your own voice.
Plant a word, watch it flourish.
Weave the past, with present sounds.
phrases.hebrew: טווה את העבר, עם צלילי הווה.
phrases.transliteration: Toveh et ha'avar, im tzil'ei hoveh.

phrases.english: Trace the roots, feel the new growth.
phrases.hebrew: עקוב אחר השורשים, הרגש את הצמיחה החדשה.
phrases.transliteration: Akav achar hashorashim, regesh et hatzmicha hachadasha.

phrases.english: I need something, for the beach.
I love the texture, of this.
phrases.hebrew: אני אוהבת את המרקם, של זה.
phrases.transliteration: Ani ohevet et ha-mirkam, shel zeh.

phrases.english: Could you wrap this, as a gift?
A light, in the distance, guides.
Keep planting seeds, see them grow.
phrases.hebrew: המשיכו לזרוע זרעים, ראו אותם גדלים.
phrases.transliteration: hamshichu lizro'a zra'im, reu otam gdlim.

phrases.english: Could we, linger, a little longer?
Understand your money, control your life.
phrases.hebrew: הבן את הכסף שלך, שלוט בחייך.
phrases.transliteration: Havin et ha'kesef shelcha, shlot be'chayaycha.

phrases.english: Find your voice, in this new language.
phrases.hebrew: מצא את קולך, בשפה החדשה הזו.
phrases.transliteration: M'tza et kol'cha, ba'safah ha'chadashah ha'zo.

phrases.english: Feel the flow, of Hebrew words.
phrases.hebrew: הרגישו את הזרימה, של מילות עברית.
phrases.transliteration: Har'gishu et ha'zrimah, shel milot Ivrit.

phrases.english: Your journey begins, with a single word.
The climb is tough, but the view...
Even shadows can't dim your light.
phrases.hebrew: אפילו צללים לא יעיבו על אורך.
phrases.transliteration: Afílu tzlalim lo ya'ívu al orech.

phrases.english: Sky turns a deep blue, clear watch.
phrases.hebrew: השמיים נהיים כחולים עמוקים, צפייה ברורה.
phrases.transliteration: Ha-shamayim nihayim k'hulim amukim, tzfiyah b'rah.

phrases.english: Air feels crisp, good to breathe.
The river flows, finding its way.
A gentle word, can soften stone.
Plant a seed, watch it rise.
The swift fox, hunts at night.
A sleepy owl, watches the moon.
A listening ear, a helping hand.
Share a smile, brighten the day.
Every person, a world of feeling.
Kindness flows, like a gentle stream.
Offer a compliment, lift a spirit.
Can I have, a little more?
The past, is a closed door.
My world, feels complete with you.
My thoughts, always wander to you.
You're the calm, in my storm.
Hum a little, brighten your day.
A single drop, makes a wave.
Let the idea, simmer a while.
Allow the thoughts, to settle down.
Give the process, its own rhythm.
Embrace the challenge, find your voice.
phrases.hebrew: קבל את האתגר, מצא את קולך.
phrases.transliteration: Kabel et ha-etgar, metza et kolkha.

phrases.english: Listen to the rhythm, let it guide.
Each new word, a tiny triumph.
Build your world, with Hebrew sounds.
Taste the spices, feel the history.
phrases.hebrew: טעם את התבלינים, הרגש את ההיסטוריה.
phrases.transliteration: Ta'am et hatavlinim, regesh et hahistoria.

phrases.english: Hum a new song, dance like no one watches.
phrases.hebrew: זמזם שיר חדש, רקוד כאילו אף אחד לא רואה.
phrases.transliteration: Zamzem shir chadash, rakod ke'ilu af echad lo ro'eh.

phrases.english: Share a story, build a connection.
Admire the ancient art, embrace the modern.
phrases.hebrew: הערך את האמנות העתיקה, חבק את המודרנית.
phrases.transliteration: Ha'arech et ha'omanut ha'atika, chabak et hamodernit.

phrases.english: Sip your coffee, watch the sunrise.
phrases.hebrew: לגום את הקפה שלך, צפה בזריחה.
phrases.transliteration: Lagom et hakofe shelcha, tzfa bazricha.
